name: android-libsparse
title: android-libsparse
description:
Library for sparse files
This library provides APIs for creating, manipulating and destroying sparse
files.
.
This library is only used by Android SDK currently.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use android-libsparse because Library for sparse files.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use android-libsparse as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair android-libsparse with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `android-libsparse --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
